title: RFO-ITS 1940 - eRPA System Enhancements
name: RFO-ITS 1940 - eRPA System Enhancements
statement_of_work: California Department of Forestry and Fire Protection (CAL FIRE) is inviting you to review and respond to this Request for Offer (RFO), entitled RFO-ITS 1940 - eRPA System Enhancements. By submitting an offer, your firm agrees to the terms and conditions stated in this RFO. dept: California Department of Forestry and Fire Protection (CAL FIRE)
description:
California Department of Forestry and Fire Protection (CAL FIRE) is inviting you to review and respond to this Request for Offer (RFO), entitled RFO-ITS 1940 - eRPA System Enhancements. By submitting an offer, your firm agrees to the terms and conditions stated in this RFO. The Offeror must hold a current Technology, Digital and Data Consulting, Master Service Agreement 5-22-70-25-001 to 359.

CAL FIRE utilizes the Electronic Request for Personnel Action (eRPA) system (Power Apps application) to manage classification, hiring, personnel transactions, and recruitment-related workflows. As statewide operational needs, hiring volume, and classification structures have evolved, existing eRPA functionality no longer fully supports the end-to-end requirements of program staff, Personnel Specialists, managers, and regional approvers.

To ensure accuracy, efficiency, compliance with civil service rules, and support for high-volume staffing operations, CAL FIRE seeks to enhance, update, and correct various components of the eRPA system. These needs include improving frontend approval workflows, expanding backend data integration, updating classification values, strengthening reporting capabilities, and ensuring the system aligns with current hiring and recruitment processes.

This Request for Offers (RFO) is issued to obtain Contractor services to perform system enhancements, defect corrections, classification table updates, workflow improvements, and reporting development within the eRPA platform. These improvements are intended to:

Improve accuracy and consistency of classification and hiring data across frontend and backend components.
- Support expanded Personnel, Recruitment, and Transactions workflows.
- Provide
